channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Former Senator Bill Cassidy Joins Democratic Challenge to Treasury Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: A legal challenge has been filed against the Trump administration's so-called Anti-Weaponization Fund, a Treasury Department program valued at approximately $1.776 billion. The fund was created follow...

item.title: Questions Raised Over Tommy Tuberville's Residency After Records Show He Voted in Florida in 2018
item.description: A report by AL.com columnist Kyle Whitmire has renewed scrutiny over U.S. Senator Tommy Tuberville's residency history and his eligibility to run for governor of Alabama. The investigation focuses on ...

item.title: Fox News Poll Shows Declining Trump Approval Ratings in Ohio Ahead of Midterm Elections
item.description: A new Fox News poll highlighted by CNN anchor Dana Bash suggests that President Donald Trump may be facing growing political challenges in Ohio as the 2026 midterm elections approach. According to the...

item.title: Arizona Attorney General to Seek Fresh Indictment Against Trump Allies in 2020 Election Interference Case
item.description: Democratic Arizona Attorney General Kris Mayes announced plans to pursue a new indictment against several allies of President Donald Trump who were involved in efforts to challenge the 2020 presidenti...

item.title: Rosalind Russell’s Rise to Hollywood Stardom During the 1930s
item.description: This article highlights a collection of photographs documenting actress Rosalind Russell during the 1930s, a pivotal decade in her career. After beginning as a Broadway performer, Russell transitioned...

item.title: Conservative commentators criticize Candace Owens over appearance at Russia's St. Petersburg forum
item.description: Conservative media personality Candace Owens has come under criticism from several prominent figures on the American right after attending the St. Petersburg International Economic Forum in Russia, an...

item.title: Michelle Phillips’ Career Reinvention in the 1970s: Acting, Music, and Hollywood Fame
item.description: The article highlights Michelle Phillips’ transformation during the 1970s after the final breakup of The Mamas & the Papas in 1971. Rather than remaining defined by her success in the influential 1960...

item.title: Mike Davis Criticizes Senate Majority Leader John Thune During Steve Bannon Podcast Appearance
item.description: Mike Davis, a Trump ally and founder of the Article III Project, sharply criticized Senate Majority Leader John Thune during an appearance on Steve Bannon's War Room podcast. Davis used profane langua...

item.title: Fan arrested and permanently banned after running onto NBA Finals court to take selfie with Victor Wembanyama
item.description: During Game 1 of the NBA Finals between the New York Knicks and the San Antonio Spurs, a fan disrupted play by running onto the court in the fourth quarter in an attempt to take a selfie video with Sp...

item.title: Internet Reacts to AI-Generated Image of Trump in Football Attire Shared During Pride Month
item.description: President Donald Trump has once again sparked widespread online discussion after an AI-generated image featuring him circulated on social media. The image depicts Trump wearing a No. 47 football jerse...

item.title: Researchers Explore Links Between Gum Disease, Oral Bacteria, and Cognitive Decline
item.description: Researchers are increasingly investigating whether oral health, particularly gum disease, may be connected to brain health and cognitive decline. Although there is currently no proof that gum disease ...

item.title: Todd Blanche's Friendship with Ghislaine Maxwell's Attorney Raises Concerns During Attorney General Confirmation Process
item.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche, President Donald Trump's former personal attorney and current nominee for the top Justice Department position, faces potential scrutiny during his Senate confirma...

item.title: John Bolton Reaches Plea Deal on Classified Documents Charges
item.description: Former national security adviser John Bolton has reached a plea agreement with federal prosecutors and is set to plead guilty to one count of illegal retention of sensitive national security documents...

item.title: Leaked communications suggest King Charles had concerns about hosting Trump's 2025 UK state visit due to Ukraine-related tensions
item.description: A report by The i Paper, cited by Raw Story, alleges that King Charles III privately expressed reservations about hosting U.S. President Donald Trump during a state visit to the United Kingdom in 2025...

item.title: Tech-Backed Candidates Suffer Major Defeats in 2026 Primary Elections
item.description: A report highlighted the poor performance of several candidates backed by wealthy technology executives and investors during the 2026 U.S. primary elections. Despite receiving substantial financial su...

item.title: Analysis Suggests Amy Coney Barrett May Support Broad Limits on Federal Court Challenges to Executive Actions

item.title: Nick Anderson Editorial Cartoon Examines MAGA Politics Through a UFC-Inspired Metaphor
item.description: This Raw Story piece is not a traditional news report but an opinion feature centered on an editorial cartoon by Pulitzer Prize-winning cartoonist Nick Anderson. Published in Raw Story's opinion secti...

item.title: Escalating Geopolitical Tensions in the Baltic Sea Region Between NATO and Russia
item.description: The Baltic Sea region is currently viewed by security experts as one of the highest-risk areas for potential direct conflict between NATO and Russia. The article highlights how NATO's eastward expansi...

item.title: Legal Analyst Says Revised DOJ Indictment Against SPLC Still Fails to Address Core Fraud Allegations

item.title: Conservative Figures Clash Over Candace Owens' Participation in Russian Economic Forum
